title: Some thoughts on relation and God?
subtitle: Recursive Meaning Engine; meaning trying to justify its own existence
description: A conceptual probe into the necessity of a witness for meaning. It reverse-engineers the Trinity from first principles, explores the observer class of AI, and probes the edges of closed-loop meaning systems.

motifMap.meaning: Active destabilization of internal models; building and breaking meaning systems.
A new observer class; knowing good/evil without understanding it.

excerpt: our story is observed and made meaningful by each other, but that is like jerking off a bit

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — “Some thoughts on relation and God?”
